title: brachyscome gracilis
intro: Brachyscome gracilis, also known as the small white daisy or the small bugloss, is a flowering plant native to Australia and New Zealand. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are utilized in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The plant has been used to alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems, such as colds and coughs, as well as to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Brachyscome gracilis is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil for its herbal uses, which can be used to treat a range of health benefits, including immune system support and digestive issues.
